name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
summary: Gemini 2.5 Pro is a balanced, stable AI model that delivers reliable multimodal reasoning across a wide range of productivity and enterprise workflows.
whyItMatters: As a widely deployed model, Gemini 2.5 Pro serves as the backbone of many Google Workspace and enterprise AI features. It prioritizes stability, predictability, and broad applicability over cutting-edge experimentation.
